channel.title: bensec blog
channel.description: Cyber security blog — CTF writeups, guides, and security research by Ben.

item.title: HTB Walkthrough: Headless
item.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of the Headless box on Hack The Box — XSS to RCE via blind injection.

item.title: TryHackMe: Buffer Overflow Prep
item.description: Detailed notes on the Buffer Overflow Prep room — stack-based overflows, bad characters, and exploit dev.

item.title: Getting Started with Bug Bounties
item.description: A beginner-friendly guide to finding your first vulnerability and navigating bug bounty platforms.

item.title: My Home Lab Setup
item.description: How I built a home lab for practising penetration testing, malware analysis, and network defence.

item.title: TryHackMe: Advent of Cyber Recap
item.description: Lessons learned and key takeaways from completing the Advent of Cyber challenge rooms.
